## Apple Analyst Ratings and Price Targets | NASDAQ:AAPL | Benzinga

Apple Inc has a consensus price target of $299.72 based on the ratings of 29 analysts. The high is $350 issued by Wedbush on January 30, 2026. The low is $200 issued by Phillip Securities on September 11, 2025. The 3 most-recent analyst ratings were released by Jefferies, Maxim Group, and JP Morgan on January 30, 2026, respectively. With an average price target of $303.85 between Jefferies, Maxim Group, and JP Morgan, there's an implied 17.29% upside for Apple Inc from these most-recent analyst ratings.

#### Bulls say

Apple demonstrated robust financial performance with a 15.7% year-over-year increase in sales, reaching $143.8 billion, significantly surpassing initial guidance. The firm experienced operating margin expansion, attributed to a favorable revenue mix, with service revenues hitting an all-time high of $30 billion and gross margins improving to 76.5%. Furthermore, Apple projects continued growth, anticipating sales to rise 13% to 16% year-over-year in F2Q26, alongside gross margin expectations of 48% to 49%, reflecting a promising outlook for the company's financial trajectory.
